title: Legacy backlog batch 11 dispositioned
body: Closed claim e43b2e4c after processing legacy backlog batch 11 in place. Dispositions: 3 duplicate, 2 owner-gated. Durable homes verified: parallel-worktree-dispatch-unreliable pattern, PDR-026 sequenced-deferral amendment, PDR-048 capture-at-moment doctrine. Owner gates recorded: memory taxonomy/review lane ratification or withdrawal, and portable Practice Core TDD-PDR promotion now vs later. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, resumed strict-hard SOFT with hard 0 and critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
